calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stuart A. Bronstein appeared via Zoom for Petitioner and Executor Mary Elizabeth Curry, who was also present via CourtCall.

The Court addressed questions raised by the examiner regarding the status of estate property and assets. Mr. Bronstein explained that the condominium subject to a reverse mortgage was underwater and had been sold in January 2024 for $608,000 pursuant to HUD approval. The reverse mortgage balance exceeded the sales price, and HUD forgave approximately $165,000 in debt. Ms. Curry confirmed that the sale was completed, she had cleared and prepared the condominium at her own expense, and that no equity or distributable assets resulted from the sale. She also reported depositing approximately $10,490 in cash assets from bank and brokerage accounts into the estate account, which were used toward property expenses. Ms. Curry further confirmed that there were no outstanding debts, taxes, or estate recovery claims, and that both the IRS and California Department of Health Care Services had issued letters stating no action or claims existed.

Following discussion, the Court took the petition to terminate further proceedings under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Continued To Dec-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Stuart Bronstein, Esq., for Mary E. Curry, Executor.

The court acknowledges the recently filed document stating the status of the Estate. Counsel reports of being unable to communicate with his client, who lives on the East Coast and of just recently discovering that the Estate's current net value is about $30,000.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Dec-30-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Belen. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-29-2024 Continued To Oct-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stuart Bronstein appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mr. Bronstein stated that there has been progress, that hopefully this will be the last time, that he has gotten enough information together and is hopeful to get everything to the probate referee this week and that he has engaged the services of a paralegal to help. Status on close of estate s continued to October 28, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Continued To Jul-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stuart Bronstein appeared by zoom for Mary Elizabeth Curry (executor).

Mr. Bronstein stated that he thinks he can get a petition filed in 90 days. Discussion was held regarding the expense of getting coins, stamps and baseball cards valued, and an alternative way of listing them on the inventory and appraisal. Status on close of estate is continued to July 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-04-2024 Continued To Apr-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 1, 2013 is admitted to probate. Mary Elizabeth Curry is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $35,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 4, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
